completion_criteria: Login button visible at top-right of home screen (website/static/index.html)
Login by Google authentication flow works end-to-end via Supabase Auth
Supabase schema for user_auth created in supabase/website/user_auth/
user_auth feature folder created at website/features/user_auth/
Auth architecture supports adding future OAuth providers (GitHub, Twitter, etc.)
Full auth flow completes under 5 seconds (login -> select account -> permissions -> logged in)
User session persisted and displayed after login (e.g., avatar/name shown)
